# Workspace Copilot Instructions

- Use the Expo + React Native + TypeScript stack defined in `plan.md` and `copilot.md`.
- Prefer small, testable edits.
- Keep changes aligned with the existing folder structure under `app/` and `src/`.
- Place shared UI in `src/components/`, feature logic in `src/features/`, and state in `src/store/`.
- Reserve `skills/` and `agents/` for reusable knowledge and agent-specific prompts.
- When generating code, prefer minimal scaffolding first, then fill in camera and filter behavior.
